name: hackaton-webhook-api
description: Modular AI-Powered Test Case Generation System with Webhook Integration

scripts.stop: taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>nul || echo No Node processes running
scripts.status: netstat -ano | findstr ":3000 :3001 :3006" || echo No servers running on ports 3000, 3001, 3006
scripts.test:postman: echo Use Postman collections in /tests/postman/ && echo Webhook: POST http://localhost:3001/webhook && echo API: POST http://localhost:3000/auto-testcase
